title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI tools to accelerate development, with high-adoption teams deploying daily and completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster. Cursor claims PayPal could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 through AI-assisted development.
